pet_notes: Use the approved student-uniform base image exactly as the identity source. Haneoka Meimi with long flowing orange hair worn down, red/pink academy cap, large blue shoujo eyes, red academy jacket/cardigan with white trim, green bow at collar, cream pleated skirt, black knee-high socks, brown short boots, and dark backpack straps held in both hands. Preserve the corrected moderately cute-tall body proportions; do not make her squat or overly tall. Keep outfit, hairstyle, accessories, face, palette, backpack straps, and 1990s shoujo anime style stable across all rows.
style_notes: 1990s shoujo anime cel shaded pet sprite style, clean ink lines, soft painted highlights, compact readable whole-body character inside 192x208 cells.
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction. Style `auto`: Infer the most appropriate pet-safe style from the user request and reference images, then keep that exact style consistent across every row. User style notes: 1990s shoujo anime cel shaded pet sprite style, clean ink lines, soft painted highlights, compact readable whole-body character inside 192x208 cells..
